entry.title: ABOUT ME
entry.content:
I am a master student at University of Minnesota, majoring in Computer Science. I am currently working with Prof. Feng Qian on video streaming systems. I am also working with Prof. Tianyi Chen on networked multi-agent reinforcement learning.

Before comming to Minnesota, I got my bachelor degree at Fudan University, where I was fortunate to be advised by Prof. Yuedong Xu.

My current research interest focus on Networked Systems, Systems for ML and Reinforcement Learning.

entry.title: EDUCATION
entry.content:
• University of Minnesota, Twin Cities, Minneapolis, U.S. : M.S., Computer Science, 2019.9 - Now
  • Fudan University, Shanghai, China: B.S., Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, 2014.9 - 2019.7
  • Fudan University, Shanghai, China: Minor, Data Science, 2017.9 - 2019.7

entry.title: PUBLICATION
entry.content:
• Mobile Volumetric Video Streaming Enhanced by Super Resolution
    Anlan Zhang, Chendong Wang, Xing Liu, Bo Han, Feng Qian.
    in MobiSys 2020 (Poster)
  • Firefly: Untethered Multi-user VR for Commodity Mobile Devices
    Xing Liu, Christina Vlachou, Feng Qian, Chendong Wang, and Kyu-Han Kim.
    in USENIX ATC 2020
